LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GENARO PAED'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CASE NO. CGC-08-482322 WITH CASE NO. CUD-08-627561. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PAED'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS DENIED. THE ALLEGATIONS STATED IN HIS COMPLAINT ARE PROPERLY PRESENTED IN AN ACTION SEPARATE FROM THE SUMMARY PROCEEDINGS IN UNLAWFUL DETAINER. THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS UNTIMELY. TRIAL IN THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 9, 2009, AFTER BEING CONTINUED FROM JANUARY 12, 2009. CONSOLIDATING THESE ACTIONS WOULD REQUIRE DELAY OF TRIAL AND PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS, THE CURRENT OWNERS OF THE PROPERTY THAT ARE SEEKING POSSESSION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ADDED, IT APPEARS THAT THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TO BE FILED BY APRIL 9, 2009. (DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER.) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Of Motion; Declaration Of Reuben L. Nocos In Support Of Motion; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GENARO PAED'S Motion To Consolidate Actions, Case No. CGC-08-482322 with Case No. CUD-08-627561. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Paed's motion to consolidate is Denied. The allegations stated in his complaint are properly presented in an action separate from the summary proceedings in unlawful detainer. The motion to consolidate is untimely. Trial in the unlawful detainer case is set for February 9, 2009, after being continued from January 12, 2009. Consolidating these actions would require delay of trial and prejudice to defendants, the current owners of the property that are seeking possession. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
